def positive_multiple_regex_passes_over_same_text_without_precompiled_plan():
    rule_id = "multiple_regex_passes_over_same_text_without_precompiled_plan"
    family = "performance"
    severity = "contextual"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description = "Flag code that re-runs several overlapping regex passes on the same text."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
